materials_list:
Lead Lined Drywall
El Dorado Metals will supply and install 4' x 10' x 5/8" Drywall 1/16" lead lined 84".

Lead Lined Frames
El Dorado Metals will supply lead lined frames (to be installed by others).

Lead Equivalent Glass
El Dorado Metals will supply and install lead equivalent glass.

Lead Lined Doors
El Dorado Metals will supply and swing lead lined doors. (Hardware Supplied and installed by others)

Heavy-Duty BPE Wall Assembly
El Dorado Metals will install 3" Borated Polyethylene (BPE) layered between lead sheets for neutron attenuation in LINAC vault.
